title: Endertech Infinity : Echocore
description: Addon mod adding extra building blocks, magical items, post-generation and more!
body:
**This is an addon mod for Endertech Infinity, which mostly adds more optional content.**

### More Building Blocks & Foliage
The most straightforward, you’ll be able to craft more building blocks out of already existing ones from the main mod.

### Staves
The main mod strongly leans into the technology side of world building, but with this addon you’ll have access to a few more mystically leaning items.

### Post-Generation
This is mostly just a term I came up with for a new more technical feature. The player is able to get Lively Grass and Fertile Sand, and then these blocks can be spread using bonemeal.

These new blocks will overtime grow a dynamic biome that will mostly vary depending on where in the world you are making it, and the biome temperature at that location.

Trees, rivers, hills, plants and more will spawn in on top of it, pretty much allowing the player to easily terraform areas as they like.

Hope you enjoy!
